name: stubrix
description: Unified mock server platform with WireMock and Mockoon engines
author: Marcelo Davanço

scripts.build: npm run build:shared && npm run build:api && npm run build:db-ui && npm run build:mock-ui && npm run build:ui && npm run build:cli
scripts.dev: npm run dev:api & npm run dev:ui
scripts.release:patch: npm run version:patch && npm run build && git add . && git commit -m "🔖 chore: bump version" && git tag -a v$(node -p "require('./package.json').version") -m "Release v$(node -p "require('./package.json').version")" && git push origin main --tags
scripts.release:minor: npm run version:minor && npm run build && git add . && git commit -m "🔖 chore: bump version" && git tag -a v$(node -p "require('./package.json').version") -m "Release v$(node -p "require('./package.json').version")" && git push origin main --tags
scripts.release:major: npm run version:major && npm run build && git add . && git commit -m "🔖 chore: bump version" && git tag -a v$(node -p "require('./package.json').version") -m "Release v$(node -p "require('./package.json').version")" && git push origin main --tags
